summary: Comprehensive testing of Dipzee feature gating, plan capabilities, and multilingual UI completed successfully. All backend APIs (23/23) and frontend flows tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Plans catalog returns starter/pro/investor with features[] and card_features[]
Backend: Superadmin login (douglas@snipertec.com.br) with plan=investor, role=superadmin
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns capabilities with features (portfolio, backtest, charts, options) and rank=3
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile saves display_name, bio, phone, country, telegram_chat_id, webhook_url
Backend: Profile avatar validation - valid base64 accepted, invalid format returns 400, oversized returns 413
Backend: Portfolio CRUD - POST/GET/DELETE with P&L calculation working
Backend: Backtest endpoint returns trades, win_rate, strategy_return_pct, buy_hold_return_pct
Backend: Feature gating - starter plan gets 403 with code='feature_locked' for portfolio/backtest
Backend: Feature gating - pro plan gets 403 for portfolio (investor-only feature)
Backend: Feature gating - investor plan gets 200 for portfolio and backtest
Backend: Market endpoints - screener (day_gainers), quote, history all working
Frontend: Superadmin login successful and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Theme toggle (data-testid=theme-toggle-button) applies/removes .dark class on html
Frontend: Theme persists across page navigation
Frontend: Markets page loads with all tabs (day_gainers, day_losers, most_actives, crypto, news)
Frontend: Markets tabs switch content correctly - table for screeners, news grid for news tab
Frontend: Portfolio page accessible for investor plan with metrics and form
Frontend: Portfolio add position works - creates row with P&L display
Frontend: Portfolio remove position works
Frontend: Settings page with all 4 tabs (profile, appearance, alerts, subscription) working
Frontend: Settings profile save button (settings-save-profile-button) functional
Frontend: Settings appearance tab has 3 theme buttons (light/dark/system) all clickable
Frontend: Settings alerts tab shows Telegram and Webhook channels (gated for messaging_alerts)
Frontend: Asset detail page loads with insights section
Frontend: Asset insights tabs (chart, fundamentals, options, backtest) all switchable
Frontend: Asset chart tab renders history chart for investor
Frontend: Asset backtest tab has run button, executes and displays results
Frontend: Feature gating UI - starter plan shows upsell for portfolio (feature-gate-portfolio)
Frontend: Feature gating UI - starter plan shows upsell for backtest and charts
Frontend: Screener page accessible for starter plan (basic screener feature)
